projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of projects I've built, showcasing my skills and passion for web development.

fineprojects.name: Fineprojects
fineprojects.description: A mobile workspace app for managing projects, meetings, leave requests, overtime, notifications, and internal operations in one platform.
fineprojects.challenge: Business workflows were spread across multiple tools. It was difficult to track progress and status in real time. Teams needed better coordination between project, HR, and management workflows.
fineprojects.solution: Built a centralized mobile app for core operational workflows. Added real-time data sync and instant notifications. Designed clear permissions and streamlined user flows to reduce friction.

finetag.name: Finetag
finetag.description: Expo/React Native mobile app for NFC scanning, Bluetooth, QR/DMC, device verification, checklist inspection, tag writing, and notifications for operational workflows.
finetag.challenge: Combining multiple identification methods like NFC, BLE, QR, and camera. Ensuring real-time data sync and handling device status.
finetag.solution: Used Expo/React Native for cross-platform development. Integrated react-native-nfc-manager, react-native-ble-plx, and vision camera.

finetalent.name: Recruitment (Finetalent)
finetalent.description: Expo/React Native mobile app for recruitment workflows, ID card QR scanning, multi-step profile entry, and CV upload for candidates.
features: Form state persistence and flow navigation
finetalent.challenge: Designing a multi-step recruitment flow with many data fields and strict validation. Integrating QR scanning for auto-filling candidate info.
finetalent.solution: Used Expo Router for clear screen separation. Used React Hook Form with Zod for validation. Integrated camera/QR scanner for ID card reading.

fine-detection.name: Fine Detection Mobile App
fine-detection.description: React Native (Expo) mobile app for manufacturing quality control and defect inspection workflows.
fine-detection.type: B2B manufacturing quality control mobile application
fine-detection.role: Mobile App Developer / React Native Engineer
features: Defect item capture and analysis flow
Product code scanning and image evidence capture
fine-detection.challenge: Digitizing a manual defect inspection workflow into a mobile-first experience. Supporting multiple user roles such as operators, supervisors, and reviewers.
fine-detection.solution: Built a React Native app with Expo Router for structured mobile navigation. Used TanStack Query and Zustand for state management.

check-calo.name: Check Calo
check-calo.description: Mobile app for tracking calories and meals via photos, supporting nutrition management, user authentication, and multi-language experience.
features: Server state management with React Query
check-calo.challenge: Need a stable starting platform instead of building from scratch. Must keep a clear architecture for easy feature expansion.
check-calo.solution: Integrated Expo Router for file-based navigation. Used Supabase for authentication. Used React Query and Zustand to separate states.
